message:
fix(codegen): Add __isabstractmethod__ field to all zero-capture closures

Python accesses __isabstractmethod__ on all callables, not just those
decorated with @abstractmethod. This caused "no field named '__isabstractmethod__'"
errors when non-decorated closures were checked for abstract status.

Now emit __isabstractmethod__: bool = false for all closures, set to true
only when @abstractmethod decorator is present.
